name: Supra
description: The SUPRA is a heavy laser gun with a short wind up time.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The SUPRA is a heavy laser gun with a short wind up time.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Juno Elite Crewman’s Supra shots doing AOE damage.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.9 + 22.20.9.1 + 22.20.9.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Specters with some projectile weapons (Supra and Paracyst in particular) shooting bullets that curve towards the player's target. No Zorg ZF1 allowed....yet...

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Supra Vandal’s tinting.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Supra/Supra Vandal’s firing sounds being cut off.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.3+20.4.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted the firing sounds of the Supra.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.1.0 Ash Revisited
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reload sounds on the Supra.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Supra damage has been reduced in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Supra appearing completely black.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: The Supra and Miter’s projectile speed has been increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Supra being unable to use the Rifle Ammo Mutation Mod.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Supra’s lensflare effect showing through walls.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Adjusted lens flare effects on the Supra’s shots.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.
The Supra has received several changes:

patchlogs.name: Update 15.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed audio issue when interrupting the Supra mid-reload.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.1.0+15.1.01
patchlogs.changes: Entropy Burst (Supra Mod) changed to max +20 Additive to base Status Chance.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Supra: Entropy Burst: Adds 5% status chance

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Supra/Boltor not using energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Lokis’ arm clipping,breaking,fusing,merging, etc. with Supra.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes:
Added custom reload animations for Dera, Supra, Lanka, Ogris, Lex, and Kraken.
Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Supra 
shots from the Supra will now correctly line up with the target reticule.
